query_name:
WITH results AS
  (SELECT i_product_name ,
          i_brand ,
          i_class ,
          i_category ,
          inv_quantity_on_hand qoh
   FROM 'inventory.parquet' AS inventory ,
        'date_dim.parquet' AS date_dim ,
        'item.parquet' AS item ,
        'warehouse.parquet' AS warehouse
   WHERE inv_date_sk=d_date_sk
     AND inv_item_sk=i_item_sk
     AND inv_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk
     AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200 + 11 ),
results_rollup AS
  (SELECT i_product_name,
          i_brand,
          i_class,
          i_category,
          avg(qoh) qoh
   FROM results
   GROUP BY i_product_name,
            i_brand,
            i_class,
            i_category
   UNION ALL SELECT i_product_name,
                    i_brand,
                    i_class,
                    NULL i_category,
                         avg(qoh) qoh
   FROM results
   GROUP BY i_product_name,
            i_brand,
            i_class
   UNION ALL SELECT i_product_name,
                    i_brand,
                    NULL i_class,
                         NULL i_category,
                              avg(qoh) qoh
   FROM results
   GROUP BY i_product_name,
            i_brand
   UNION ALL SELECT i_product_name,
                    NULL i_brand,
                         NULL i_class,
                              NULL i_category,
                                   avg(qoh) qoh
   FROM results
   GROUP BY i_product_name
   UNION ALL SELECT NULL i_product_name,
                         NULL i_brand,
                              NULL i_class,
                                   NULL i_category,
                                        avg(qoh) qoh
   FROM results)
SELECT i_product_name,
       i_brand,
       i_class,
       i_category,
       qoh
FROM results_rollup
ORDER BY qoh NULLS FIRST,
         i_product_name NULLS FIRST,
         i_brand NULLS FIRST,
         i_class NULLS FIRST,
         i_category NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 100;
